steps.title: Connect doubt to mismatch
steps.content: Ecologists have reservations about traditional pollination-syndrome descriptions because recent observations of floral-trait combinations do not line up neatly with those descriptions. The blank must describe a mismatch between the descriptions and the observations.

steps.title: Reject nonconflict meanings
steps.content: B suggests announcements, C suggests repetitions, and D suggests similarities. None of those would naturally lead ecologists to doubt the descriptions' usefulness. The needed phrase means mismatches between the two bodies of information. The answer is A.
